summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: K_5 with 5 YELLOW vertices and all 10 BLUE edges. ValueTracker layout_tr morphs vertex positions between pentagon (L1) and outer-triangle+inner (L3) layouts; always_redraw edges + RED crossing dots + live-count panel. No layout achieves zero crossings; V=5, E=10 > 3V-6=9 fails Euler's planarity bound.
